meaning: n.(尤指用于培养微生物的)恒化器
examples: In this paper, we present and analyze a simple model for a chemostat with predator, prey and periodically pulsed input and washout substrate.
The fermentation kinetics of S-adenosyl-L-methionine (SAM) producing Saccharomyces cerevisiae HYS98 was studied through chemostat cultivation.
The delay nutrient recycling is considered in the models of competition in a chemostat with an external inhibitor, the sufficient conditions of bounded in the system is obtained.
In their research, the two professors used a chemostat, which is a continuous cell culture.
